recommended_actions_24h: Isolate and monitor systems using Aquasecurity Trivy
title: Aquasecurity Trivy RCE
summary: [P1] Aquasecurity Trivy contains an embedded malicious code vulnerability that could allow an attacker to gain access to systems. This vulnerability is being actively exploited in the wild. Why now: Reported exploitation in the wild (confidence: 0.90)

title: IBM Knowledge Catalog Vulnerability
summary: [P2] IBM Knowledge Catalog Standard Cartridge contains a vulnerability that could allow an attacker to gain access to systems. No patch is currently available. Why now: Lack of available patch (confidence: 0.60)
